pr.title: Non-record: Looped Transformer + LoRA + Skip Connections + NorMuon + SWA + Int6 + Sliding Window

output.summary: Looping five transformer blocks into 30 virtual layers with per-layer LoRA and decoder skip connections plus tailored NorMuon/SWA training.
techniques: Looped transformer with per-virtual-layer LoRA and skip connections
NorMuon optimizer with wallclock warmdown and SWA
Int6 quantization with fp16 embeddings and sliding-window eval
